meta.title: The Air Force's predictions for the future of warfare
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

With China recently unveiling its new stealth aircraft in testing and the future of America’s own Next-Generation Air Dominance Fighter still uncertain, the Air Force released its 22-page vision of the future of air warfare in a newly released report titled simply: “The Department of the Air Force in 2050.”
